creator: s-hrgsh@chic.ocn.ne.jp
text:
The error was caused by the BF cipher being treated as regacy with openssl3.0.

modify System settings
/etc/ssl/openssl.conf

[provider_sect]
default = default_sect
legacy = legacy_sect #<<< add

and 

[legacy_sect] #<<< add
activate = 1  #<<< add

By adding , the BF cipher can be used as before.
However, in this case, I think it would be better to switch to AES encryption.
In vtund.conf
encrypt yes; ---> encrypt aes256ecb;
